name: ethernetPacket::SetData
title: ethernetPacket::SetData
syntax: word ethernetPacket.SetData(word offset, char source[], word length); // form 1
description: Copies bytes from a char array, byte array, CAPL struct or system variable struct to the data of an Ethernet packet.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Byte offset of the data in the ethernetPacket. Offset 0 is the byte directly after the Ethertype.

return: Number of bytes copied to the ethernetPacket.
